summary: App with Internet Identity authentication and admin role management. User 'Akshit raj' needs to be set as admin for the Customize tab. Currently adding a principal ID display feature to identify the admin principal.
architectural_notes: Uses Internet Identity for authentication; admin role is determined by hardcoded principal ID
Customize tab should only be visible to the admin user
known_issues: Admin principal ID not yet set — Customize tab not visible to intended admin ('Akshit raj')

existing_features.title: Display the currently logged-in user's Internet Identity principal ID visibly on the page (e.g., in the Navbar or as a dismissible banner) whenever the user is authenticated, so the admin ('Akshit raj') can easily copy and share their principal ID.

new_feature_requests.summary: Display principal ID for logged-in Internet Identity user so admin can be identified
